Name: Average time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the entire process segment starting at Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and ending at SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Total time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Checklist Completed in cases where both appear consecutively or non-consecutively
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time required to reach SW-Reviewer Agreed after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in high-performance variants (e.g., those with performance < median)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants involving co-author creation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-Reviewer Agreed after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission, compared to the average time to perform SW-Reviewer Agreed after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that do not proceed to reviewer invitation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total resolution time of the phase initiated by Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and concluded by the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission when it appears multiple times in the same case, measured from its first to last occurrence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Time between the last occurrence of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-co-author cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
